ddls:
CREATE TABLE "people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each person */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the person */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the person */,
  "racial_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the racial category of the person */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the person */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address of the person */,
  "timestamp_inquiry_sent_out" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inquiry was sent out */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the person */,
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income level of the person */,
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status of the person */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_income_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_level_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_status ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_employment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_status_id") REFERENCES employment_status ("employment_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_racial_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("racial_category_id") REFERENCES racial_categories ("racial_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_education_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_categories" (
  "racial_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "racial_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("racial_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, administrative, online platform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people_data_sources" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data collected from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id", "data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for better tracking */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES people ("person_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "employment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "employment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)
